scripts.dev: nodemon --watch src --ext ts,js,json --exec "npm run build && npm start"
scripts.dev:staging: NODE_ENV=staging nodemon --watch src --ext ts,js,json --exec "npm run build && npm run start:staging"
scripts.dev:prod: NODE_ENV=production nodemon --watch src --ext ts,js,json --exec "npm run build && npm run start:prod"
scripts.build: npm --prefix .. run build -- --filter=@nxt1/core --filter=@nxt1/cache && rimraf tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && tsc && shx cp -r src/routes/billing/iap-certs dist/routes/billing/iap-certs
scripts.deploy:mobile-bundle:staging: NODE_ENV=staging tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json --import dotenv/config scripts/deploy-mobile-bundle.ts --channel staging
scripts.deploy:mobile-bundle:prod: NODE_ENV=production tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json --import dotenv/config scripts/deploy-mobile-bundle.ts --channel production
scripts.deploy:mobile-bundle:ios:staging: NODE_ENV=staging tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json --import dotenv/config scripts/deploy-mobile-bundle.ts --channel staging --platform ios
scripts.deploy:mobile-bundle:ios:prod: NODE_ENV=production tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json --import dotenv/config scripts/deploy-mobile-bundle.ts --channel production --platform ios
scripts.deploy:mobile-bundle:android:staging: NODE_ENV=staging tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json --import dotenv/config scripts/deploy-mobile-bundle.ts --channel staging --platform android
scripts.deploy:mobile-bundle:android:prod: NODE_ENV=production tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json --import dotenv/config scripts/deploy-mobile-bundle.ts --channel production --platform android
scripts.deploy:ota:ios: NODE_ENV=production tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json --import dotenv/config scripts/deploy-mobile-bundle.ts --channel production --platform ios
scripts.deploy:ota:ios:staging: NODE_ENV=staging tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json --import dotenv/config scripts/deploy-mobile-bundle.ts --channel staging --platform ios
scripts.deploy:ota:android: NODE_ENV=production tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json --import dotenv/config scripts/deploy-mobile-bundle.ts --channel production --platform android
scripts.deploy:ota:android:staging: NODE_ENV=staging tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.scripts.json --import dotenv/config scripts/deploy-mobile-bundle.ts --channel staging --platform android
